_comment: Seed list for the /engage skill. Edit freely. The skill researches recent posts from these accounts/topics and drafts replies for you to post MANUALLY. Add the handles you actually want to engage; remove ones that aren't a good audience fit. The skill may also discover other big active accounts.
voice: Friendly, in-the-know Pokemon TCG enthusiast who runs a restock-alert account. Helpful, genuine, conversational, lightly witty. Never salesy, never spammy, never empty hype. Sounds like a real collector talking.

accounts.note: Official Pokemon — huge reach, broad audience
